Rights.Note: CC0 1.0 Universal is the Creative Commons license applicable to all publicly available SPASE metadata descriptions

ResourceHeader.ResourceName: NASA Goddard Space Flight Center Eclipse Web Site
ResourceHeader.Description: This website contains 5000 years of eclipse calculations including solar and lunar eclipses as well as planetary transits across the Sun. The site contains data, maps of the path of the events and descriptive text for selected events. All eclipse calculations are by Fred Espenak and Jean Meeus.
ResourceHeader.Acknowledgement: Please acknowledge the following: Eclipse Predictions by Fred Espenak (NASA GSFC) and Jean Meeus

InformationURL.Name: NASA Reference Publication 1178: Fifty Year Canon of Solar Eclipses: 1986 - 2035
NASA Reference Publication 1216: Fifty Year Canon of Lunar Eclipses: 1986 - 2035
NASA Technical Publication TP-2006-214141: Five Millennium Canon of Solar Eclipses: -1999 to +3000
NASA Technical Publication TP-2009-214174: Five Millennium Catalog of Solar Eclipses: -1999 to +3000
NASA Technical Publication TP-2009-214172: Five Millennium Canon of Lunar Eclipses: -1999 to +3000
NASA Technical Publication TP-2009-214173: Five Millennium Catalog of Lunar Eclipses: -1999 to +3000

AccessURL.Name: NASA Goddard Space Flight Center Eclipse Web Site
AccessURL.Description: This website is available as a resource for eclipse and transit records and information.
